meaning: n.拉格(印度教的一种传统曲调)
examples: The problems of subsystems are solved by RAGA.
So, let's listen to Ravi Shankar play a bit of a raga using a six-note scale.
The sensitive indexes of crop water model for spring wheat has been get with RAGA.
The city has its own rhythm, which takes a little while to hear: it is a complex but playful raga, a gliding, light-footed dance that all of Mumbai seems to know.
